summary.en: A supporting customer-value lens from Bain that breaks perceived value into 30 elements across functional, emotional, life-changing, and social-impact levels. Use it to deepen VPC, JTBD, empathy, and journey work — not as a standalone primary canvas.
summary.zh: 贝恩提出的辅助型客户价值透镜，把感知价值拆成 30 个元素，分布在功能、情感、改变人生和社会影响四个层级。它用于深化 VPC、JTBD、共情图和客户旅程，而不是独立主画布。

sources.label: Bain & Company · The Elements of Value

note.en: Primary Bain/HBR article describing 30 Elements of Value in four categories.
note.zh: 介绍 30 个价值元素及四个层级的 Bain/HBR 主要文章。

note.en: Public interactive hierarchy used to map the value elements into VPC, JTBD, empathy, and journey work.
note.zh: 可公开查看的价值层级交互图，可用于映射到 VPC、JTBD、共情图和客户旅程。
